fixtureDescription: Mixed Korean-English Konglish text with English loanwords
passage: 오늘 English class에서 presentation을 했는데 정말 nervous했어요. Teacher가 feedback을 주셨는데, pronunciation은 좋지만 vocabulary가 부족하다고 하셨어요. 그래서 오늘부터 매일 reading practice를 하려고 해요. 특히 academic words를 많이 외워야 할 것 같아요. Study group 친구들이랑 같이 하면 더 재미있을 것 같아요.

items.definition: a group of students who meet together to study or learn
feeling worried or anxious about something
comments or advice about how well someone has done something
the way a word or language is spoken
all the words a person knows or uses
relating to education, schools, or studying
doing something repeatedly to improve your skill
